## Title: Fix HARQ retransmission parameter override in UL scheduler

### Summary
The UL scheduler was incorrectly recalculating MCS and RB allocations during HARQ retransmissions. When a HARQ process entered retransmission mode (round_UL > 0), the code path would still call `calculate_max_mcs_min_rb()`, potentially overriding the original transmission parameters with newly calculated values. This caused mismatched redundancy versions and incorrect HARQ behavior, as retransmissions must use the
